educationData.title: Media College Denmark
educationData.subtitle: Focused on frontend development with React and Next.js, building practical projects, collaborating in teams, and working with modern UI/UX and API-based applications.
list: JavaScript (ES6+) – dynamic and interactive web applications.
Tailwind CSS – responsive and maintainable UI styling.
REST APIs – data fetching and backend integration.
UI/UX Design – wireframes and interface design in Figma.
Git & GitHub – version control and team collaboration.
Basic backend knowledge – Express.js, MongoDB and Supabase.

educationData.title: GoIT IT school
educationData.subtitle: Online education focused on foundational web development and frontend technologies. Built practical experience through projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.
list: JavaScript (ES6+) – DOM manipulation, events and API requests
React – component-based architecture and state handling
Forms, user input and interactive UI development
React Hooks and React Router for application structure
Basic Redux & Redux Toolkit for state management
Introduction to TypeScript in React projects
